raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 469 will ensure that state records are consistently and properly managed by requiring each state agency to appoint a Records Management Coordinator.",
    "AB 469 will improve transparency and better protect sensitive information.",
    "Currently, the State Records Management Act does not specify a training plan or reporting schedule for agencies to process and report on document storage.",
    "Due to inconsistent implementation, the Secretary of State has seen historical records mistakenly destroyed or confidential information mistakenly made public.",
    "AB 469 will reduce the state’s risk in mismanaging records.",
    "AB 469 will help ensure departments treat their records appropriately to enable greater public access.",
    "AB 469 will ensure that all state agencies receive training from the California State Archives to learn current best practices for records management."
  ]
}
```
